stories.title: Tyler O'Neill — 6 Consecutive Opening Day HRs, MLB All-Time Record

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Tyler O'Neill homered on Opening Day for the 6th consecutive season.

That's an MLB all-time record per Elias Sports Bureau.

Previous best: 4 straight — Berra, Carter, and Hundley.

Six years. In a row. Every single year.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #BaseballHistory

facebook.image_caption:
#### Image Caption -- 8:00 AM ET

```
Six consecutive Opening Day home runs. Tyler O'Neill just set an MLB all-time record — and most fans don't even know it yet.
```

article.headline: Tyler O'Neill's 6 Consecutive Opening Day HRs: The Most Quietly Historic Record in Baseball

stories.title: McGreevy's 6 No-Hit Innings + Cardinals Walk-Off in the 10th

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Michael McGreevy's Cardinals debut on Saturday:

6 no-hit innings. 5 Ks. 96 pitches.

The no-hit bid ended in the 7th. The Cardinals trailed. Then JJ Wetherholt lined a walk-off RBI single in the 10th.

Cardinals 6, Rays 5. Two rookies, one game.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Cardinals

facebook.image_caption:
#### Image Caption -- 10:30 AM ET

```
McGreevy: 6 no-hit innings in his MLB debut. Wetherholt: walk-off RBI single in the 10th in his 2nd career game. Cardinals 6, Rays 5. One Saturday afternoon in St. Louis. 🔥
```

article.headline: McGreevy Throws 6 No-Hit Innings, Wetherholt Delivers Walk-Off: Cardinals 6, Rays 5 in Ten

stories.title: Will Smith Birthday Walk-Off HR — Dodgers Sweep Diamondbacks 3-0

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Dodgers 3, Diamondbacks 2. Series sweep complete.

Glasnow: 6 IP. Tucker: leaping catch to rob a HR. Diaz: saves.

Arizona led 2-0 in all 3 games. Lost all three.

The Dodgers are on an 8-game winning streak spanning two seasons.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Dodgers

facebook.image_caption:
#### Image Caption -- 4:00 PM ET

```
Will Smith hit a go-ahead 2-run HR on his 31st birthday. The Dodgers swept the Diamondbacks 3-0. Arizona led 2-0 in every game. Lost all three. 🎂
```

article.headline: Will Smith's Birthday Walk-Off Completes Dodgers' Sweep of Diamondbacks: LA Now on 8-Game Win Streak

stories.title: Chase DeLauter — 2 HRs in His MLB Debut, Including Go-Ahead in the 9th

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Chase DeLauter had played in just 138 minor-league games — hurt for most of his career since being drafted in 2022.

On Opening Day, he hit TWO home runs for the Guardians. Including the go-ahead shot in the 9th inning.

That's a debut.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Guardians

facebook.image_caption:
#### Image Caption -- 9:00 AM ET

```
138 minor-league games across 3.5 years — mostly hurt. Chase DeLauter's response on Opening Day? Two home runs, including the go-ahead shot in the 9th. 💪
```

article.headline: Chase DeLauter Hits 2 HRs in His MLB Debut — Including the Go-Ahead Shot in the 9th

stories.title: Shohei Ohtani Pitching Debut Set for Tuesday, March 31

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani's 2026 pitching debut is Tuesday vs. the Guardians.

Final spring outing: 4 innings, 11 strikeouts, 99 mph.

Dave Roberts: "The intensity was there, the focus was there."

He hit 55 HRs last year. Now the pitching begins. ⚾

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Dodgers

facebook.image_caption:
#### Image Caption -- 2:00 PM ET

```
Shohei Ohtani's first 2026 pitching start: Tuesday, March 31 vs. Cleveland. Spring final: 4 IP, 11 K, 99 mph. The two-way era officially begins again.
```

stories.title: JJ Wetherholt — HR and Walk-Off RBI in His First 2 Career Games

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
JJ Wetherholt in his first 2 major league games:

Game 1: 425-foot home run in his first MLB at-bat.
Game 2: Walk-off RBI single in the 10th inning.

Two games. Two defining moments.

The Cardinals' No. 1 prospect has already delivered.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Cardinals

facebook.image_caption:
#### Image Caption -- 12:30 PM ET

```
JJ Wetherholt: 425-ft HR in his first career at-bat. Walk-off RBI single in his second game. The Cardinals' No. 1 prospect is already delivering.
```

stories.title: Opening Weekend Final Standings — Dodgers 3-0, Pirates 0-3, and More

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Opening Weekend 2026 is almost in the books.

Dodgers: 3-0. Cardinals: 2-0. Brewers: 2-0. Mets: 2-0. Yankees: 2-0.

Pirates: 0-2. Diamondbacks: 0-3.

Three games means nothing. The vibes, though? Very clear.

#BallparkBanter #MLB #Baseball

facebook.image_caption:
#### Image Caption -- 7:00 PM ET

```
Three games in. Opening Weekend 2026 delivered records, walk-offs, and very clear early narratives. The Dodgers are 3-0. The Pirates are 0-2. The 162-game season is just getting started.
```
